steps.title: Identify the author's appeal
steps.content: The key signal is “Those who have had the rare privilege of reading her stirring biography, will, I am sure, bear me out in this statement.” The author appeals to what readers of the biography would think to support his claim about Brown's remarkable character.

steps.title: Match the reference's function
steps.content:
The reference works by suggesting that people familiar with Brown's biography would share the author's admiration — it invokes their agreement to validate his assessment.

  • A overstates the passage by claiming unjustified popularity of the subject
  • C attributes to the reference something explained elsewhere in the text
  • D wrongly asserts the reference describes their relationship
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
